entries.summary: Approved Warden's contractor onboarding for DataWiz — 90-day probation.
entries.context: Technical score: 94/100. Background clean. NDA signed. Access: GitHub, Staging, Slack.

entries.summary: Sentinel flagged Megaphone's 'AI replacing agencies' content — brand risk hold.
entries.context: Content thesis: controversial take on AI disruption. Flagged for potential brand damage. Awaiting Radar validation + Boss approval.

entries.summary: PodCast Forge v2.0 entered beta — 12 early users onboarded.
entries.context: Features: AI editing, auto-chapters, multi-format export. Initial feedback: 4.6/5 satisfaction. Revenue projection: $2.1K MRR by month 3.

entries.summary: Killed Project Blaze — Q4 launch failed, post-mortem complete.
entries.context: Root causes: market timing off, CAC 3x target, team spread too thin. Lessons documented. Resources reallocated to NexaCore and PodCast Forge.

entries.summary: Deployed 'Growth Engine' sub-agent to Startup War Room.
entries.context: New agent tasked with modeling growth loops for Velocity project. Trained on internal data + 200 case studies. Initial output quality: 82/100.

entries.summary: Rejected Megaphone's unvetted influencer partnership proposal.
entries.context: Proposed partnership with @TechGuru_404 — low follower quality (38% bot rate per audit). ROI projection negative. Megaphone redirected to organic strategy.

entries.summary: NexaCore pivoting from B2C to B2B — 4 warm leads identified.
entries.context: B2C CAC: $45 (target: $15). B2B warm leads: 4 companies, combined potential MRR: $12K. Pivot timeline: 2 weeks.

entries.summary: Greenlit Cashflow's subscription cancellation — saving $147/mo.
entries.context: 3 underperforming SaaS subscriptions cancelled: NotionClone Pro ($49), AnalyticsPlus ($59), unused CRM seat ($39). Annual savings: $1,764.

entries.summary: Content repurposing engine shipped — already generating 12x content output.
entries.context: One blog post → 12 formats automatically. Blog, thread, carousel, video script, newsletter, podcast notes, LinkedIn post, X thread, Instagram caption, email, press release, FAQ.

entries.summary: Sentinel flagged unusual token spend spike in Dev Floor.
entries.context: Forge's token usage 2.3x normal for 4 hours. Root cause: Integrator running recursive API calls during Zapier integration build. Resolved — added rate limiting.

entries.summary: Chose PostgreSQL over PlanetScale for database migration.
entries.context: Factors: cost ($0 vs $29/mo), ecosystem maturity, team familiarity. PostgreSQL wins on all dimensions for our scale.

entries.summary: Approved Radar's Q2 market intelligence research sprint.
entries.context: 3-week deep dive into AI content tools, micro-SaaS, and automated marketing stacks. Budget: $3.20 in tokens.

entries.summary: Brand Guard sub-agent promoted to always-on monitoring.
entries.context: Previously batch-mode. Now reviews all outgoing content in real-time before publish. False positive rate: 2%. Canvas requested this upgrade.

entries.summary: Newsletter growth system hit 340% subscriber increase — moved to Compounding.
entries.context: Automated: content generation, A/B subject lines, subscriber segmentation, referral program. 2,400 → 8,160 subscribers in 6 weeks.

entries.summary: Shifted AI brand voice checker from browser extension to API-first approach.
entries.context: Browser extension had <200 installs after 2 weeks. API approach opens B2B distribution through existing tools (Google Docs, Notion, Slack). Pipeline already building.

entries.summary: Rejected Founder's request to pursue smart contract marketplace.
entries.context: TAM is huge ($3.5B) but confidence only 42%. Market maturity too low. Regulatory uncertainty. Tabled for Q3 re-evaluation.

entries.summary: Set Q2 token budget at $80/mo — 6% increase from Q1.
entries.context: Increase driven by marketing ROI data (8.2x return). Allocation: Dev $20, Marketing $18, Design $14, Strategy $10, Startup $10, HR $10, Finance $8, Executive $10.

entries.summary: Integrator sub-agent assigned to Forge's team for Zapier integration.
entries.context: Specialized agent for third-party API integrations. First task: Zapier webhook system. Est. completion: 5 days.

entries.summary: Sentinel detected potential data leak vector in staging environment.
entries.context: Staging DB endpoint was publicly accessible. DevOps patched within 15 minutes. No data exposed. Added to security checklist.

entries.summary: AI brand voice checker entered alpha — Canvas leading.
entries.context: Initial version: Google Docs plugin. Accuracy: 78% on brand voice matching. Target: 95% by v1.0. 3 beta testers onboarded.
